subject: A winged humanoid figure carries an injured or unconscious companion through the foggy skies above a gothic city
description: Two humanoid figures dominate the frame: one upright and carrying, one slumped and supported. The standing figure has dark flowing hair styled upward, wears armor with a large embossed medallion on the chest, and appears to have dark wings or a flowing dark cape. They cradle the other figure — who is unconscious or gravely injured, in leather and cloth armor — against their body. The expressions of both are closed-eyed and peaceful in an eerie way. In the background, a gothic city skyline is barely visible through heavy gray fog, and a spire with a small sun motif is faintly visible. Small sun symbols appear on the carrying figure's armor. The palette is almost entirely desaturated: warm golds and tans, muted stone-white, with charcoal and black. An Orzhov aesthetic is strongly suggested by the monochrome palette and architectural motifs.
foreground: winged or caped humanoid carrying an unconscious companion
background: foggy gothic city skyline, spire with sun motif
emotion: solemnity and tenderness — carrying the fallen
